title: OPC TAG
body: Set the OPC Item Path to point at the PLC variable. The tag becomes a live reference, refreshed at the scan class rate.
code:
New Tag:
  Name:      TK101_Level
  Tag Type:  OPC
  DataType:  Float8
  OPC Server: Ignition OPC-UA Server
  Item Path: ns=1;s=[PLC1]Program:MainProgram.TK101_Level

Via UDT param:
  tagPath = "[PLC1]Program:MainProgram.TK101"
  Member Amps → {tagPath}_Amps

Quality 192 = GOOD, 0 = BAD.
key: OPC Item Path = PLC variable path
Use Quick Client to copy paths
mistakes: Typo in OPC Item Path (case sensitive!)
Tag type mismatch with PLC variable
